summary: Email OTP login and subscription-based feature gating.
release_notes: Added passwordless email login via AWS Cognito — enter your email, receive a 6-digit OTP, sign in.
Login screen gates the app until authenticated; session persists for 30 days with automatic token refresh.
User email shown in top bar with click-to-logout.
Subscription tier feature gating: Trade button hidden for base (scanner) tier, Analytics hidden for scanner and scanner-trading tiers.
Analytics page shows lock screen if accessed without full-access subscription.
OTP input supports paste, auto-advance between digits, and auto-submit when all 6 digits entered.
Removed Halted filter from screener filter bars (halted scanner tab and HLT badges unchanged).
Fixed 64-bit Windows title bar icon — ctypes argtypes/restype now declared correctly for pointer-sized handles.
Build script auto-fetches Cognito Pool ID and Client ID from CloudFormation at build time.
Help page updated with Login section documenting the sign-in flow.
